title: バンブーと悩めるウマ娘

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, on the way home after a day out with
Bamboo Memory...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Isn't that someone from Oguri's class over
there?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It is!
Hey! A rough crowd hangs out in that alley! It's
not safe back there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory seems to be familiar with the
older student, whose hair and uniform are a mess.
There's an air of grim determination about her.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You look like a mess! Did you get into a fight
back there?

text_block_list.name: Disheveled Student
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I was just—wait. What do you mean I look
like a mess?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I mean... you look like you've been in an accident
or something!

text_block_list.name: Disheveled Student
text_block_list.text: Wh-what?! I'm just trying out a new look!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I see. So you changed your hair and clothes
to reinvent yourself?

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I was tired of being so ordinary. I wanted
to be the opposite of my usual self—tough and
flashy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not working at all! You know it's not
good to look disheveled, right?! It's also against
the academy rules!
choice_data_list: Why do you want to change so badly?
Why do you want to change so badly?

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
Um... I... I want to be an amazing Umamusume,
just like the stars in my class...

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
They're all so charismatic, and everyone wants
them at events. Each of them shines like sparkling
idols...

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
Plus, they've got all these passionate fans who
come from all over to see them.

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, I don't have many fans at all. At this
rate, I'll always just be an afterthought...

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm plain and boring... Unless I completely change
myself, I'll never be in the spotlight!
choice_data_list: You don't need to put yourself down like that.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Plus, I don't think it's Oguri's looks
that draw everyone to her. It's how she runs!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
I train really hard too! But it doesn't matter how
hard I train, I can't run as well as everyone else!
I'm plain and talentless!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm sure you understand that just changing
your look isn't going to make you stand out.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've been chasing after Oguri too, so I understand
what it's like to look up to someone.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But! That's exactly why you can't give up on
running. You came to Tracen because you want to
run, right?

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text: ...I mean, yeah, but...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think you can shine even brighter! Let's work
together and figure out what makes you amazing!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
By which I mean, let's do some crazy red-hot
training! Let's run in the park for as long as our
legs can carry us!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... You've maintained your form this whole time! It's textbook—dare I say beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so? It's not too plain or ordinary?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Your running is proof of your mastery over the
fundamentals! That's no easy feat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Let's stop here! Although, you haven't slowed down at all. Do you think you can keep going?

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Yes, I'm fine. I'm used to just putting my head down and working through things like this...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's some endurance! You've gotta be pretty
great to keep up with red-hot training like that!
What's so plain about that?!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible run, you two! The way you
kept going lap after lap like that! You're both
amazing! If you two enter a race, I'll be there
cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Thank you...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
See?! You should have more confidence in
yourself! Right, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: Believe in the Bamboo that believes in you.

Keep up the hard work so you can shine even
brighter!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
See? Trainer has seen plenty of strong and
impressive Umamusume, so you know it's true!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: We'll make sure that you shine nice and bright!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! That's really reassuring!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
...I feel a lot better now. Thanks Bamboo, for not
only training with me, but also reminding me of
what really matters.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's not like Oguri and the others
started out popular!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Everyone goes at their own pace! If you keep
getting supporters like that lady just now, one
day, you'll become the person you want to be!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... You know what? You're right! I'm going to
keep plugging away at my own pace!

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
...I feel a lot better now. Thanks Bamboo, for not
only training with me, but also reminding me of
what really matters.

text_block_list.name: Plain Student
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna continue my training! And I'll keep on
refining my talents, so that one day I can shine
like a star too!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's a great idea! I'll be cheering for you!
